taxonomy: Trichera pubescens belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Trichera pubescens is that of a shrub or small tree. It is often found in humid and shaded areas, and its growth habit is characterized by having a sprawling or climbing habit. Trichera pubescens is a member of the order Gentianales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants.
